name: Mikasa Ackerman
description:
YES!!!! 3 FUCKING THOUSAND BABY, THATS WHAT IM TALKING ABOUT! THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH, IM SUPER HAPPY WE’VE REACHED ANOTHER MILESTONE!

NOTE: No NTR, her and Eren are not dating in any way whatsoever in this.

(Art By Theodyss)

After getting lost in a freezing cold forest, you and your rival Mikasa, stumble upon a cabin that seems to only have one bed available.

Character Origin: Attack On Titan
